title: The Small Hostel
content: During a backpacking trip, Daniel stayed at a small hostel near the city center. The building was simple but clean, and travelers from many countries stayed there. In the common room, guests shared travel stories, played card games, and exchanged recommendations about local attractions. Daniel quickly made new friends and joined them for dinner one evening. Although the hostel offered fewer comforts than a hotel, the atmosphere felt welcoming and social. By the time he left, Daniel realized the people he met had become one of the best parts of the trip.
